meta_title: For Students: user onboarding to Solve can't deploy apps (Beginner Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome can't deploy apps. A Beginner-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: User Onboarding to Solve Deployment Issues
content.seo_description: Learn to master user onboarding and overcome deployment hurdles. A beginner-level case study using Antigravity and Claude Code to launch your first app.
content.answer_block: Deployment failure often stems from unmanaged environment variables and missing onboarding flows. By implementing a structured user onboarding sequence, you force your application to validate state and configuration before launch. Using Antigravity and Claude Code, you can automate these checks, ensuring your project deploys successfully every single time.
content.intro:
You’ve spent weeks crafting the perfect logic, only to hit a wall of cryptic server errors the moment you attempt to deploy. The screen flickers, the terminal spits out red text, and your dream project sits stranded on your local machine. This is the 'Deployment Valley of Death'—a rite of passage for every developer that feels like a dead end.

But here is the secret: your app isn't broken; it's unguided. By integrating a robust user onboarding flow, you create a checkpoint system that validates your environment, configuration, and dependencies before a single user touches your code. Let's turn that frustration into a production-ready reality.

steps.title: Configure Environment Guardrails
steps.description: Before onboarding begins, ensure the app validates its environment variables. This prevents runtime crashes during deployment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create an environment validator function that checks for required API keys and database URLs before the app initializes.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'implement environment validation in main.py'

steps.title: Build the Onboarding Workflow
steps.description: Create a visual step-by-step onboarding sequence that guides users through your app's core value proposition.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a React-based onboarding modal component with three distinct steps: Welcome, Profile Setup, and Goal Setting.

steps.title: State Persistence Logic
steps.description: Ensure the onboarding progress is saved to the backend so users don't repeat the process on refresh.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a Supabase hook to save onboarding status to the user profile table upon completion of the final step.

steps.title: Deployment Hook Integration
steps.description: Add a pre-deployment check that runs your onboarding tests to ensure the build pipeline doesn't fail.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a shell script that runs local unit tests for onboarding components before deployment trigger.

steps.title: Final Deployment Sync
steps.description: Use Claude Code to push your code and verify the production environment reflects your onboarding flow.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review current codebase for deployment readiness and provide a checklist for Vercel deployment.

pro_tips: Always use a .env.example file; never commit raw keys to your repository.
Implement 'feature flags' in your onboarding to toggle features without redeploying code.
Use console.trace() during onboarding development to visualize the exact path of user state changes.
Keep your onboarding under 30 seconds; friction at the start leads to immediate abandonment.
Automate your testing; if it isn't tested in the CI/CD pipeline, it is already broken.
content.next_steps: After deploying your app, focus on analytics. Integrate a tool like PostHog to see exactly where users drop off in your new onboarding flow and iterate from there.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical foundation to stop fearing the 'deploy' button and start scaling your software. The bridge between a student project and a professional SaaS is consistency and process. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
